creator: mike@biesele.com
text:
On an HPE MSA60 fully populated with 12 SATA disks, sesutil map only shows 11 disks.  Possibly related, using 'sesutil locate' using either disk or sesid affects the wrong slot in the shelf by +1.  That is, given disk da1 in physical slot 1 in the shelf, 'sesutil locate da1 on' illuminates the locate LED in slot 2.  sas2ircu reports the shelf contents accurately, however.  

System is an HPE ProLiant DL360p Gen8.  HBA is an Avago LSI 2008 flashed with the IT firmware.  

Disks da1-da12 are in the MSA60.
